name: Theming & Shared UI Components
description: Defines the app-wide dark theme through XAML resource dictionaries, semantic brush keys, and value converters. Provides shared dialog infrastructure (DarkDialog, DarkDialogWindow) and common UI helpers.

  L69: ShowAlert(string message, string title) -> void
  L112: ShowTextInput(string title, string prompt, string defaultValue = "") -> string?

  L36: Create(string title, double width, double height, ResizeMode resizeMode = ResizeMode.NoResize, bool topmost = false, string backgroundResource = "BgSurface", string titleColorResource = "Accent") -> DarkDialogWindow  // Creates a configured DarkDialogWindow, mirroring the old DialogFactory.Create...
  L88: SetBodyContent(UIElement content) -> void  // Sets the dialog body content (the area below the title bar).
